summary: Iteration 108 - Homepage redesign testing complete. All 16 features verified: 4 AI-generated images load correctly from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com, hero section with dashboard mockup and floating badge (150+ products tracked), trust bar with 4 items, feature showcase with 4 cards, How It Works with 4 steps, live trending products loading from API (6 products), UK section with map visual and 6 feature badges, use cases with 6 solution cards, methodology with 7 signal scoring bars, free tools teaser with 4 tool cards, final CTA with Start Free and See Pricing buttons. All CTAs navigate correctly. Page is fully responsive on mobile. No console errors.
passed_tests: Hero section renders with dashboard mockup image on right side
Hero dashboard image (AI-generated) loads from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com
Product analysis image (AI-generated) loads correctly
UK map visual (AI-generated) loads correctly
Trending products visual (AI-generated) loads correctly
Hero CTA 'Start Free' button navigates to /signup
Hero CTA 'See Trending Products' button navigates to /trending-products
Trust bar section renders with 4 items (UK-first intelligence, 7-signal viability scoring, Multi-channel trend detection, Updated daily)
Feature showcase section renders with product analysis image and 4 feature cards
How It Works section renders with 4 step cards (01-04)
Live trending products section loads 6 real products from API
UK section renders with UK map visual and 6 feature badges (VAT & landed cost, Shipping practicality, Margin potential, Saturation levels, Returns friction, Channel fit)
Use cases section renders with 6 solution cards

Methodology section renders with 7 signal scoring bars (Trend momentum 82%, Market saturation 45%, Margin potential 68%, Ad opportunity 55%, Search growth 72%, Social buzz 90%, Supplier availability 60%)
Free tools teaser section renders with 4 tool cards (Profit Calculator, Product Validator, TikTok Ad Budget, Validation Checklist)
Final CTA section renders with Start Free and See Pricing buttons
Floating badge shows 'Products tracked 150+'
All links navigate to correct routes
Page is responsive on mobile viewport (390x844)
Mobile menu toggle works correctly
No console errors on page load (desktop and mobile)
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx correctly uses 4 AI-generated images from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
API call to /api/public/trending-products?limit=6 works correctly and loads real product data
The '150+ products tracked' is real data as per honesty policy
The 7-signal scoring percentages are illustrative of the scoring model methodology, not fabricated user data
Page uses proper lazy loading for images below the fold
Hero image uses loading='eager' for above-the-fold performance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 108 verified the redesigned homepage with 4 AI-generated images.
